source_note: NY PSC Order Releasing Audit Report, Case 23-M-0103 (24 pp) — releases NorthStar Consulting Group's Comprehensive Management and Operations Audit of NYSEG and RG&E (PSL §66(19)) and directs the companies to file an implementation plan. Issued at the Commission session held May 15, 2025.
